extraction.one_line_summary: LYSENKO Alexey won Stage 5 on Green Mountain after Astana domestiques (Hirt) paced out breakaway and GC rivals, teammate LOPEZ finishing second.
tactical_patterns: Astana burned domestique Hirt completely to control pace up Green Mountain, eliminating breakaway and non-climbers simultaneously.
MARCATO drove breakaway from UAE Emirates despite no team GC threat, suggesting tactical experimentation or resource misallocation.
Astana deployed dual-leadership with Lysenko and Lopez both going strong together, intentionally preserving 1-2 team GC options.

rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: negative: explicitly in difficulty on Green Mountain climb, confirming classics riders cannot limit losses on sustained climbs
rider_signals.HIRT Jan: negative: dropped after massive pacing work for Astana, revealing team willingness to sacrifice domestiques completely for GC control
rider_signals.CARPENTER Robin: positive: Rally Cycling rider held on longest from breakaway on climb, suggesting unexpected climbing range beyond Tour of Alberta skillset
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: positive: matched teammate Lysenko strength-for-strength on final climb while in white jersey, signaling he wasn't riding defensively despite youth jersey
